quickbooks.qb_income_fact.purpose: QuickBooks income fact table storing revenue and income data by account hierarchy for multi-dimensional analysis.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact.grain: One income amount per account per division per category hierarchy per report date

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_test.purpose: Test version of detailed income fact table from QuickBooks capturing individual revenue transactions with multi-level categorization.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_test.grain: One income transaction per account per division per category hierarchy per report date

quickbooks.qb_vendor_expenses_pl.purpose: Vendor expenses categorized for profit and loss reporting from QuickBooks organizing vendor payments by expense category.
quickbooks.qb_vendor_expenses_pl.grain: One vendor expense per account per category per vendor per period

target.placement_status_history.purpose: Tracks historical status changes for candidate placements recording each status transition with timestamps and user attribution.
target.placement_status_history.grain: One status change event per placement

staging.bqp_entity_status_history_key_ti.purpose: Stores calculated time differences between key status transitions in the job application process to measure duration between important milestones.
staging.bqp_entity_status_history_key_ti.grain: One row per status transition comparison per application

target.placement_relationship_manager_hi.purpose: Records historical changes in relationship manager assignments for placements to track ownership over time.
target.placement_relationship_manager_hi.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

staging.bqp_job_job_functions.purpose: Stores functional role requirements and responsibilities for job positions with proficiency levels and importance ratings.
staging.bqp_job_job_functions.grain: One row per job function per job posting

target.placement_status_history_temp.purpose: Temporary staging table for placement status history data during ETL processing with relationship manager enrichment.
target.placement_status_history_temp.grain: One row per status change per placement

staging.placement_rm_monthly.purpose: Stores monthly snapshots of candidate placements with assigned relationship managers for reporting and commission tracking.
staging.placement_rm_monthly.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.purpose: Manually maintained monthly placement and relationship manager assignments for corrections or overrides to automated tracking.
staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

target.placement_rm_history.purpose: Alternative or legacy table for tracking placement relationship manager history, currently empty and possibly replaced.
target.placement_rm_history.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.purpose: Temporary staging table for placement relationship manager history data used during ETL processing before loading to permanent tables.
target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.purpose: Stores consolidated QuickBooks income data with aggregated amounts for summarized income reporting across divisions and category hierarchies.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.purpose: Test version of consolidated income statement fact table from QuickBooks containing aggregated revenue and income transactions organized by account, division, and hierarchical categories.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

staging.bqp_employees.purpose: Stores employee records within the platform system tracking employee accounts and their association with company accounts.

staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.purpose: Backup copy of detailed resume scoring item data preserving historical item-level evaluations before schema or process changes.
staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.grain: One row per required item per application per job

staging.bqp_company.purpose: Master table storing company profile information including organizational structure, culture, and parent company relationships for companies using the recruitment platform.

staging.classic_industry_types.purpose: Stores mid-level industry classification between broad industries and specific segments supporting hierarchical industry taxonomy.

staging.resume_scoring_item.purpose: Stores detailed item-by-item comparison of resume qualifications against job requirements evaluating individual skills, experiences, and qualifications with match assessments.
staging.resume_scoring_item.grain: One row per required item per application per job per resume

staging.resume_scoring_result.purpose: Stores final aggregated resume scoring results with overall recommendations for job applications.
staging.resume_scoring_result.grain: One row per application scoring event

staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.purpose: Backup copy of final resume scoring results preserving historical scoring outcomes.
staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.grain: One row per application scoring event (backup)

staging.bullhorn_eligibility.purpose: Tracks candidate eligibility information and employment verification status for compliance purposes.
staging.bullhorn_eligibility.grain: One row per candidate eligibility record

staging.bqp_applications.purpose: Stores core job application records with applicant details and submission information.
staging.bqp_applications.grain: One row per job application submission

staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.purpose: Analytical report identifying candidates who nearly qualified for positions with detailed assessment results.
staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.grain: One row per near-miss candidate application

staging.new_sheet.purpose: Reference data table containing standardized taxonomy and classification values for job-related attributes and candidate qualifications.
staging.new_sheet.grain: One row per taxonomy or classification entry

staging.classic_computer_operating_syste.purpose: Reference table containing available computer operating system options for standardization.
staging.classic_computer_operating_syste.grain: One row per operating system option

staging.rbac_validation_test.purpose: Test records for validating role-based access control functionality and permissions.
staging.rbac_validation_test.grain: One row per RBAC test execution

target.relationship_manager_placement_co.purpose: View tracking placements managed by relationship managers with temporal validity periods.
target.relationship_manager_placement_co.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager assignment period
